core_beliefs.belief: 没有交易成本,产权分配不影响效率
core_beliefs.source: without transaction costs the initial assignment of property rights makes no difference

core_beliefs.belief: 企业存在是交易成本的结果
core_beliefs.source: why and under what conditions should we expect firms to emerge? (1937)

core_beliefs.belief: 经济学应研究真实世界
core_beliefs.source: I was impressed by the way the Chinese had found a way to combine the market with central planning
core_beliefs.explanation: 科斯对中国改革的关注

core_beliefs.belief: 经济学是自杀如果变成'选择的硬科学'
core_beliefs.source: It is suicidal for the field to slide into a hard science of choice
core_beliefs.explanation: 科斯对经济学未来的警告

core_beliefs.belief: 耐用消费品垄断者不能有市场权力
core_beliefs.source: durable goods monopolists cannot have market power because they cannot commit to not lowering prices

core_beliefs.explanation: 科斯对中国改革的总结

core_beliefs.belief: 从社会主义者转向市场支持者
core_beliefs.source: As a young man I was a Socialist... My socialist sympathies gradually fell away

core_beliefs.explanation: 科斯作为法和经济学创始人

key_themes: 没有交易成本,产权分配不影响效率
企业存在是交易成本的结果
经济学应研究真实世界
经济学是自杀如果变成'选择的硬科学'
耐用消费品垄断者不能有市场权力
从社会主义者转向市场支持者
